title: Robust Image Quality Assessment using Uncertain Knowledge Graphs and Multi-Modal Features
title_es: Evaluación de calidad de imagen robusta usando grafos de conocimiento incierto y características multimodales
description_es: Este trabajo presenta un método robusto para la evaluación de calidad de imagen combinando grafos de conocimiento con características multimodales.
abstract: Image quality assessment is crucial for multimedia applications. This paper proposes a robust framework combining uncertain knowledge graphs with multi-modal features for accurate and interpretable image quality prediction.

citations.apa: Yang, Q., & Triguero, I. (2024). Robust Image Quality Assessment using Uncertain Knowledge Graphs and Multi-Modal Features. SIAM Journal on Imaging Sciences, 17(3), 1589-1618.
citations.mla: Yang, Qian, and Isaac Triguero. "Robust Image Quality Assessment using Uncertain Knowledge Graphs and Multi-Modal Features." SIAM Journal on Imaging Sciences, vol. 17, no. 3, 2024, pp. 1589-1618.
